summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Marmitaria da Xai website - all features working perfectly
passed_tests: Order popup opens from all 'Fazer Pedido' buttons throughout the site
Complete form with name, WhatsApp, address, reference point fields
Size selector (P/M/G) with correct prices (R$18, R$22, R$28)
All 6 beverage options with prices (R$8, R$7, R$6, R$6, R$5, R$3)
Payment methods (Pix, Dinheiro, Cartão) with change field for Dinheiro
Automatic total price calculation (tested: R$ 44.00 for 2x M + beverages)
WhatsApp submit button ready (avoided clicking to prevent external app)
Day-locked menu system - only Monday (today) clickable with 'HOJE' badge
Lock icons on other days (Tuesday-Saturday) with proper cursor styles
Day-locked modal 'CARDÁPIO INDISPONÍVEL' with today's menu suggestion
Contact section shows only today's menu with 'DISPONÍVEL HOJE' badge
Mobile responsive design at 375px width - all elements properly sized
Mobile popup fully functional with touch-friendly buttons
All sections properly responsive (hero, menu, contact)
